title: NightlitEvo Addonpack
description: NightlitEvo is an expansion to Alien Evolution Addon adding new aliens and items
body:
**NightlitEvo** is a **Palladium Addon** and an expansion for the **Alien Evolution Addon**, introducing a range of new aliens and gameplay features that enhance the alien transformation experience.

**New Aliens:**

- **Hybridized Galvan** – A unique fusion alien inspired by the Ben 10 franchise
- **Repo** – Based on the mysterious entity from the game R.E.P.O.
- **Perseus Void** – An original creation, bringing cool mechanics
  
**New Superpower:**
- **Osmosian (WIP)** – Kevin Levin’s mutation from Ben 10 franchise

**New Items:**

- **DNA Device** – A tool that allows players to acquire the new aliens in survival mode
- **DNA Samples (x3)** – Essential items for unlocking and transforming into the new aliens
- **DNA Remains (x3)** – Used to craft DNA Samples and progress through alien evolution
- **Empty Redstone Block** – Can be recharded via a recipe

**Info:**

- View [the full list of absorbable blocks here](https://pastebin.com/raw/7GDjN36G)
